Austria and Jordan will close out the day in another important group-stage clash.Here is the full schedule for today’s FIFA World Cup 2026 matches, including kick-off times and venues:Time: 12:30 a.m. ISTVenue: New York New Jersey Stadium, East RutherfordTime: 3:30 a.m. ISTVenue: Boston Stadium, FoxboroughTime: 6:30 a.m. ISTVenue: Kansas City Stadium, Kansas CityTime: 9:30 a.m. ISTVenue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, Santa ClaraFrance begin their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Senegal at New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford. Article Title: 'Nothing to do with football': Lionel Messi reveals why he cried after Argentina's FIFA World Cup win over Algeria
Article Text:
Lionel Messi (AP Photo)

NEW DELHI: Lionel Messi celebrated a historic night with tears, a hat-trick and yet another record as Argentina began their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign with a dominant 3-0 win over Algeria in Group J at the Kansas City Stadium.The 38-year-old was seen emotional after scoring the first of his three goals, leaving fans wondering about the reason behind his tears. After the match, Messi explained that his emotional reaction had nothing to do with football "It had nothing to do with football, I went through some difficult days," Messi said after the game. "It was a matter totally unrelated to sports; I went through some difficult, complicated days."Although he chose not to reveal further details, Messi thanked those around him for helping him through the difficult period."I'm grateful to the entire delegation, to my teammates. They made a lot of effort to make sure I am doing well," he added.The emotional moment was followed by a memorable performance. Messi scored his first-ever World Cup hat-trick and equalled Germany legend Miroslav Klose's all-time World Cup goalscoring record of 16 goals.Messi had started the match three goals short of Klose's mark but reached the milestone within 76 minutes. The Argentina captain first had a goal ruled out for offside before opening the scoring in spectacular fashion. Picking up the ball around 30 yards from goal, he beat his marker and curled a brilliant effort past goalkeeper Luca Zidane.Algeria managed to keep Argentina largely under control for the remainder of the first half, though Alexis Mac Allister came close with a header that went over the bar. At the other end, Anis Hadj Moussa created one of Algeria's best chances, but Emiliano Martinez collected comfortably after a deflection took the pace off the shot.The Argentine superstar completed his hat-trick with a trademark curling finish from the edge of the box, marking his 200th senior international appearance in style.Messi later reflected on where he stands in his remarkable career."It makes me very happy to have lived through everything that came my way. What I'm experiencing now is the cherry on top," Messi said. "I'm very happy and grateful for this wonderful group. I am enjoying it so much."The hat-trick added another chapter to an extraordinary international career that has already seen Messi lead Argentina to Copa America titles in 2021 and 2024, the 2022 Finalissima crown and, most importantly, the 2022 FIFA World Cup title.Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni could only marvel at another masterclass from his captain."I am at a loss for words about Leo. What can I say?" Scaloni said. "He's incredible."The victory gave defending champions Argentina the perfect start to their title defence. Having now drawn level with Klose on 16 World Cup goals, Messi will have the chance to become the tournament's outright leading scorer when Argentina face Austria on June 22.
Article Summary: Lionel messi scored a hat-trick in argentina's 3-0 win over algeria. Messi equalled miroslav klose's all-time world cup goalscoring record of 16. The 38-year-old was seen emotional after scoring first of his three goals.

Article Title: Lionel Messi scripts history with first FIFA World Cup hat-trick, equals Miroslav Klose's all-time goals record
Article Text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi (10) celebrates after scoring the opening goal. (AP Photo)

Twenty years after his debut, another landmark



Mbappe and Haaland upstaged



Messi-mania takes over Kansas City



Lionel Messi added yet another extraordinary chapter to his storied career, scoring his first-ever World Cup hat-trick to lead defending champions Argentina to a commanding 3-0 victory over Algeria and move level with Germany legend Miroslav Klose atop the tournament's all-time scoring charts.The 38-year-old struck once in the first half, added a simple tap-in shortly after the restart and completed his treble with a trademark finish in the 76th minute, sending the thousands of Argentina supporters packed inside Arrowhead Stadium into delirium.It was the 61st hat-trick of Messi's illustrious career and his 11th for Argentina, but remarkably his first on football's biggest stage. The treble also extended his scoring streak to five consecutive World Cup matches.The magical evening came exactly 20 years after Messi made his World Cup debut against Serbia and Montenegro in Germany in 2006, a match in which he also found the net.Making his 200th appearance for Argentina, the eight-time Ballon d'Or winner became only the second player after Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo to score in five different editions of the World Cup.More significantly, his hat-trick took his World Cup tally to 16 goals, drawing him level with Klose's long-standing record.With several matches still to come in Argentina's title defence, the prospect of Messi becoming the outright record-holder appears increasingly inevitable.Messi's heroics overshadowed impressive performances from two of football's biggest stars earlier in the day.France forward Kylian Mbappe scored twice in Les Bleus' 3-1 victory over Senegal to move to 14 World Cup goals, level with West Germany great Gerd Muller in fourth place on the all-time list.Norway's Erling Haaland also netted a brace in his side's emphatic 4-1 win over Iraq, but the night ultimately belonged to the Argentine icon.Argentina's arrival in Kansas City has sparked a wave of "Messi-mania," and the atmosphere around Arrowhead Stadium reflected the adoration reserved for one of the sport's greatest figures.Thousands of fans wearing the iconic No. 10 jersey turned the home of the NFL's Kansas City Chiefs into a sea of blue and white, singing tributes to their hero from Rosario.
Article Summary: Lionel messi scores his first-ever world cup hat-trick to lead argentina to a commanding 3-0 victory over algeria. The 38-year-old struck once in the first half, added a simple tap-in shortly after the restart and completed his treble with a trademark finish in the 76th minute.

Article Title: Will Cristiano Ronaldo quit too? Portugal boss Roberto Martinez to step down after World Cup in huge shake-up
Article Text:
Portugal coach Roberto Martinez hugs Cristiano Ronaldo during an international friendly soccer match between Portugal and Nigeria in Leiria, Portugal, Wednesday, June 10, 2026. (AP Photo/Ana Brigida)

Martinez's decision signals the end of a successful cycle

Portugal head coach Roberto Martinez, center, arrives for the World Cup Soccer tournament, Friday, June 12, 2026, in West Palm Beach, Fla. (AP Photo/Lynne Sladky)

Portugal insist full focus remains on the World Cup

Ronaldo's final World Cup?

Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo walks to the becnh after he was substituted during an international friendly soccer match between Portugal and Nigeria in Leiria, Portugal, Wednesday, June 10, 2026. (AP Photo/Ana Brigida)

Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo warms up during the men's national soccer team training session ahead of their FIFA World Cup soccer tournament Saturday, June 13, 2026, in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla. (AP Photo/Marta Lavandier)

Portugal's 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign is set to begin under the shadow of a major decision that could reshape the national team beyond this summer. Roberto Martinez will not continue as Portugal manager after the tournament, with the Spaniard having decided against renewing the contract that expires at the end of July. His departure will close a three-and-a-half-year spell in charge and raises an equally significant question about the future of Cristiano Ronaldo , who is widely expected to be playing in his final World Cup at the age of 41.As Portugal prepare to face DR Congo in Houston on June 17 before further Group K fixtures against Uzbekistan on June 23 and Colombia on June 27, the tournament could mark the end of one era and the beginning of another.According to talkSPORT , Martinez has informed Portuguese football authorities that he will not renew his contract when it expires following the World Cup.The decision appears to have been made in conjunction with the Portuguese Football Federation, allowing preparations for a successor to begin quietly before the tournament reaches its conclusion.Explaining the situation, talkSPORT correspondent Alex Crook said: "I am told it it is his decision not to renew his contract with Martinez looking to return to club management either in the Premier League or a top European side, or potentially, take over one of the other big European nations."Crook added: "We've not heard anything publicly about it, but no doubt, he will be asked about it the next time he faces the media. But the decision has been made in conjunction with the Portuguese FA, so they can start looking for a potential successor."Martinez has overseen one of the most productive periods in Portugal's recent history. The nation entered his tenure already carrying the achievements of the Euro 2016 title and the inaugural UEFA Nations League triumph in 2019. Under his leadership, Portugal added a second Nations League crown in 2025 and maintained a consistently high level of performance.The former Everton and Wigan Athletic manager also owns a 70 per cent win rate with Portugal, the highest of any coach in the country's history, while becoming the fastest manager to oversee 100 goals scored by the national team.Although Portugal exited Euro 2024 in the quarter-finals after a penalty shootout defeat to France, Martinez quickly responded by guiding the team to Nations League success against Spain the following year.His World Cup record remains mixed. Martinez led Belgium to a third-place finish in 2018 before suffering a shock group-stage elimination in Qatar four years later.Reports surrounding Martinez's future have grown louder during the build-up to Portugal's opener, but the federation has attempted to keep attention on the tournament itself.Responding to speculation, a spokesperson for the Portuguese Football Federation told the Press Association: "The FPF and Roberto Martinez are focused exclusively on the World Cup. The federation and the coach are aligned on this matter, as they have publicly stated."The Press Association also reported that Martinez and the federation have agreed that any formal discussions regarding his future will wait until after the finals.Martinez took charge in January 2023 following his departure from Belgium and is understood to be considering a return to club football in England or elsewhere in Europe, while another international position also remains a possibility.While Martinez's departure has become a major talking point, much of the attention inevitably returns to Ronaldo.The Portugal captain is competing in his sixth World Cup and has repeatedly suggested that this tournament is likely to be his last appearance on football's biggest stage. The World Cup remains the only major trophy absent from a career that already includes European Championship success, Nations League titles, five Ballons d'Or and countless domestic honours.Bruno Fernandes acknowledged the significance of sharing the stage with Ronaldo once again, particularly with the captain preparing for what is widely expected to be his final World Cup appearance.“We’ve all grown up watching Cristiano Ronaldo play and for us it’s such an honor to play next to him now in the same team,” Fernandes said at a press conference ahead of Portugal’s World Cup opener against DR Congo. “I think he’s also anxious because at the end of the day he’s also representing his national team and we know how passionate he is when he plays for Portugal. We’re all here to support him and to support Portugal to go as far as possible. ”That sense of Ronaldo's enduring influence extended beyond the dressing room and into Martinez's own assessment of the player, with the Portugal coach stressing that the 41-year-old remains one of the most important figures in the squad despite entering his sixth World Cup."He's a role model," Martinez said. "He's an iconic player in global football for young athletes, children male and female, who start feeling the love for football when playing on the street, and that is wonderful for us. It is his sixth World Cup but internally it feels like his first World Cup when it comes to his intensity, emotions and ability to lead the group.""Within the team he is a vital player because he is the finisher, he is the player in the penalty area, he is the player who has those movements that can open spaces for other players. Within our attacking game, his numbers reflect the importance he has."Whether Ronaldo chooses to continue beyond the tournament remains unknown. What is clear is that Martinez will leave regardless of Portugal's performance in North America.For a squad featuring Ronaldo, Bruno Fernandes and Vitinha, the coming weeks offer an opportunity to achieve something no Portugal manager has managed before: winning the FIFA World Cup. If that ambition is realised, Martinez would depart with the greatest achievement in Portuguese football history, while Ronaldo would finally claim the one prize that has eluded him throughout an extraordinary international career.
Article Summary: Portugal's 2026 fifa world cup campaign is set to begin under the shadow of a major decision that could reshape the national team. Roberto martinez will not continue as portugal manager after the tournament, with the spaniard having decided against renewing the contract that expires at the end of july.

Article Title: Cristiano Ronaldo's fiancée Georgina Rodriguez drops intimate family photos as Portuguese icon prepares for FIFA World Cup glory
Article Text:
Georgina Rodriguez and Cristiano Ronaldo (Getty Images)

What did Georgina Rodriguez post for the twins' birthday?



What records is Cristiano Ronaldo chasing at the 2026 FIFA World Cup?



Portugal's match against DR Congo at Houston's NRG Stadium on Wednesday, June 17, is one of the most anticipated fixtures of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. But before Cristiano Ronaldo takes the pitch, his fiancee Georgina Rodriguez made sure the family had something to celebrate first. Over the weekend, Rodriguez posted a heartfelt birthday tribute for her twins, Eva and Mateo, who turned nine. Ronaldo was away with the national squad, but that didn't stop the party from happening.Rodriguez took to Instagram to share a gallery of photos and videos from a carnival-themed birthday party she organised for Eva and Mateo. "Celebrating the birthday of the loves of my life," she wrote in her caption, alongside clips that gave followers a proper look at the celebration.The post drew a flood of warm responses from fans. "Happy birthday to Princess Eva and little star Mateo," one follower commented, with pink and blue hearts and a cake emoji. "A beautiful birthday and many more," said another. "Happy birthday to the most beautiful twin," a third chimed in.Rodriguez also had some career news to celebrate last weekend. She posted a separate set of photos and videos from her global campaign with Italian fashion label Calzedonia, proudly calling herself a "Calzedonia girl."The images showed her modelling the line across various locations around the world, underlining her growing profile as a fashion figure in her own right.This is Cristiano Ronaldo's sixth World Cup, a record for men's football. No player in the history of the tournament has appeared at as many. At 41, the Al Nassr forward is almost certainly making his final appearance on football's biggest stage, and the weight of that is not lost on anyone watching.The records he carries into this tournament are staggering. Ronaldo is the only player in football history to have scored 100 or more competitive goals for four different clubs: Manchester United, Real Madrid, Juventus and Al Nassr. He was also the inaugural winner of the FIFA Puskas Award in 2009 for his long-range strike against Porto while at United. And he remains the only player ever to finish as top scorer in the Premier League, La Liga and Serie A.The one thing missing from his trophy cabinet is a World Cup winner's medal. Portugal have never lifted the trophy, and with Ronaldo in the twilight of his career, this may be the country's last realistic chance with him leading the line. The DR Congo match is just the beginning, but for Ronaldo, every game from here is one he cannot afford to waste.Also visit: FIFA World Cup 2026 schedule and FIFA Points Table 2026
Article Summary: Cristiano ronaldo's portugal face dr congo in the 2026 fifa world cup. Ronaldo's fiancee georgina rodriguez celebrated her twins' birthday. Rodriguez posted a gallery of photos and videos from a carnival-themed party she organised for eva and mateo. The post drew a flood of warm responses from fans.

Article Title: "Got to work on himself": Sean Payton breaks silence on Jonathon Cooper situation amid growing uncertainty around Broncos star
Article Text:
Sean Payton breaks silence on Jonathon Cooper amid growing uncertainty around Broncos star(Getty)

Sean Payton says Jonathon Cooper has work to do as the Denver Broncos await more information



The Denver Broncos opened mandatory minicamp this week with a cloud hanging over one of their biggest defensive names. Jonathon Cooper was nowhere to be seen, and it did not take long for questions to shift from football to what comes next.The questions surrounding Jonathon Cooper are no longer limited to the courtroom. They have now reached the Broncos' locker room as well. With the star linebacker absent from mandatory minicamp and the organization still assessing the situation, Sean Payton faced the inevitable task of addressing one of the biggest storylines of Denver's offseason. His comments offered a glimpse into how the Broncos are handling a difficult situation while waiting for more clarity. .Speaking to reporters during the Denver Broncos mandatory minicamp, head coach Sean Payton confirmed that the team had excused Jonathon Cooper from team activities while the organization continues to gather details surrounding his legal situation."We've excused him from this. He's taking this time, obviously, he's got to work on himself, and the club is very much in tune with the league office, local authorities here.Clearly, there's a bar that we have, and an expectation that we have that's very high. We'll consider all of that as we continue to gather the information."Sean Payton did not offer a blanket endorsement of his player. Instead, he stressed accountability and made it clear that Denver's standards still apply, regardless of status or contract value.Cooper's role within the Broncos makes the situation impossible to ignore. The outside linebacker signed a four-year, $60 million extension in November 2025 after establishing himself as one of the team's most reliable defensive players. He recorded 10.5 sacks last season and entered 2026 with expectations of leading Denver's pass rush once again. That is why Payton's remarks carried extra weight. The Broncos are not discussing a depth piece. They are navigating difficult questions involving one of the most important players on their defense.The comments come less than two weeks after Jonathon Cooper and his girlfriend, Jade Fiegen, were arrested on June 5 following an alleged domestic dispute. Authorities initially charged both with domestic violence-related offenses and criminal mischief after an argument tied to cheating allegations reportedly escalated and left both of their cellphones damaged.Jonathan Cooper later faced additional charges following a second arrest on June 11. Meanwhile, on Tuesday, prosecutors dropped the case against Fiegen. That development left Cooper as the only person still facing charges connected to the incident.His attorney, Harvey Steinberg, criticised the decision and questioned why the prosecution moved forward against his client while dismissing the charges against Fiegen. Cooper is scheduled to appear in court on July 22.For now, the Denver Broncos are not rushing to conclusions. Still, Sean Payton's comments offered the clearest glimpse yet into how the organization views the situation. Denver is watching closely. Cooper has stepped away from football. And until more answers arrive, uncertainty continues to surround one of the Broncos' most important defensive players.
Article Summary: Sean payton breaks silence on jonathon cooper amid growing uncertainty around broncos star. Payton did not offer a blanket endorsement of his player. Instead, he stressed accountability and made it clear that denver's standards still apply, regardless of status or contract value.

Article Title: Indiana Fever vs. Toronto Tempo: How many points did Caitlin Clark and Sophie Cunningham score?
Article Text:
Caitlin Clark and Sophie Cunningham. Image via: Jess Rapfogel/ Getty Images

How many points did Caitlin Clark score?



Caitlin Clark. Image via: Rafael Suanes/Imagn Images

How many points did Sophie Cunningham score?



Sophie Cunningham. Image via: Mark J. Rebilas/ Imagn Images

Indiana Fever vs. Toronto Tempo: Game injury

Upcoming Indiana Fever games



June 18: vs. Atlanta Dream

June 20: at Atlanta Dream

June 22: vs. Phoenix Mercury

June 24: vs. Phoenix Mercury

Indiana Fever vs. Toronto Tempo was an offensive showcase on Tuesday night, with Caitlin Clark and Sophie Cunningham helping power Indiana to a 113-91 victory at Gainbridge Fieldhouse.The win extended the Fever's winning streak to four games and improved their record to 9-5, while also setting a franchise record for points scored in regulation. For fans wondering how many points Clark and Cunningham scored, the answer is 21 and 24, respectively, as both played key roles in one of Indiana's most complete performances of the season.The Fever's balanced attack overwhelmed Toronto from the second half onward. Kelsey Mitchell led all Indiana scorers with 27 points, while Aliyah Boston added 18 points and 11 rebounds. Yet it was Clark's playmaking and Cunningham's shooting that stood out as Indiana continued building momentum in the middle of the WNBA season.Clark finished with 21 points, 14 assists and five rebounds in 32 minutes, recording her 22nd career double-double and one of her most impactful all-around games of the season.Although the former Iowa star struggled from long range, shooting 1-for-8 from three-point territory and 5-for-15 overall, she repeatedly created scoring opportunities for teammates. Her season-high 14 assists helped Indiana generate 25 team assists and maintain offensive rhythm throughout the game.One of the night's highlights came in the third quarter when Clark threaded a behind-the-back pass through traffic to Makayla Timpson for an easy basket. The sequence underscored the court vision that has made Clark one of the league's premier playmakers.Cunningham delivered her best scoring performance of the season, finishing with 24 points and seven rebounds off the bench.She shot an efficient 8-for-11 from the field and connected on 6-of-7 attempts from beyond the arc. Her timely shooting repeatedly halted Toronto rallies, including a buzzer-beating three-pointer to end the first quarter and another late triple that pushed Indiana's lead into double digits during the second half.The performance continued a strong stretch for Cunningham, who entered the game fresh off an 11-point burst late in Indiana's previous victory over the Connecticut Sun.The Fever suffered an early scare when veteran forward Myisha Hines-Allen exited after being struck in the face while attempting a layup.Hines-Allen left the floor after just 21 seconds and was initially listed as questionable to return with a facial injury. However, she rejoined the bench after halftime and later returned to action midway through the third quarter, avoiding what appeared to be a more serious setback.Indiana will look to extend its four-game winning streak with a busy stretch ahead:The Fever have now won four straight and, perhaps more importantly, showed they can protect a double-digit lead.
Article Summary: Indiana fever defeated toronto tempo 113-91 on tuesday night. The win extended the fever's winning streak to four games and improved their record to 9-5. Caitlin clark and sophie cunningham scored 21 and 24 points, respectively. The fever also set a franchise record for points scored in regulation.

Article Title: Who is Zidane Iqbal? The Iraq midfielder making history as first player of Pakistani origin to play at World Cup
Article Text:
Zidane Iqbal became the first player of Pakistani origin to feature at a World Cup while representing Iraq/ Image: X

A historic substitution in Foxborough

From Manchester to the World Cup

Iraq's Ali Alhamadi, right, and Iraq's Zidane Iqbal exercise during a training session ahead of the World Cup Group I soccer match between Iraq and Norway in Foxborough, Mass., near Boston, Monday, June 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Martin Meissner)

Establishing himself in Iraq's midfield

Iraq’s return to the FIFA World Cup after 40 years ended in a 4-1 defeat to Norway in Foxborough, but the game still produced a piece of history. When Zidane Iqbal came off the bench in the 59th minute, becoming the first player of Pakistani heritage to feature in a men’s World Cup match.The milestone arrived on a difficult evening for Iraq, who were facing their first World Cup match since Mexico 1986 and eventually fell to a Norway side inspired by Erling Haaland's first-half brace. Yet amid the disappointment of defeat, Iqbal's appearance represented a significant moment for Iraqi football, British South Asian representation and Pakistani football history.The landmark moment arrived shortly before the hour mark at Boston Stadium. With Iraq trailing Norway during their opening Group I fixture, head coach Jesús Casas turned to his bench in the 59th minute and introduced Iqbal in place of midfielder Zaid Ismael. The substitution gave the 22-year-old the final 31 minutes of regulation time plus stoppage time to influence the contest.The significance of the change extended well beyond tactical considerations. By stepping onto the pitch, Iqbal became the first player of British-Pakistani heritage ever to feature in a men's FIFA World Cup match.He also became the first player of Pakistani origin to appear at football's biggest tournament.The occasion added another chapter to a career already filled with notable firsts. Earlier in his development, Iqbal became the first Iraqi player to represent Manchester United and the first British South Asian footballer to appear in the UEFA Champions League.While Iraq ultimately suffered a heavy defeat, the midfielder's World Cup debut ensured the evening would still occupy a unique place in football history.Iqbal's path to the World Cup began thousands of miles away from Iraq. Born and raised in Manchester, England, he grew up with a multicultural background that made him eligible to represent multiple nations. His father is Pakistani, with family roots in Sahiwal and Sialkot, while his mother is Iraqi.Under FIFA eligibility rules, Iqbal could have pursued an international future with England, Pakistan or Iraq. The Iraqi Football Association identified his potential early and actively recruited him through the youth levels, offering a clear pathway towards senior international football.That long-term approach eventually proved decisive.Iqbal formally secured an Iraqi passport in May 2021, paving the way for his international future with the Lions of Mesopotamia. Less than a year later, he made his senior debut against Iran in a FIFA World Cup qualifier at Tehran's Azadi Stadium on January 27, 2022, appearing as a late substitute to earn his first international cap.The decision has since developed into a substantial international career. By the time Iraq arrived at the 2026 World Cup, Iqbal had accumulated 24 senior appearances for his adopted national team.Although still only 22, Iqbal has already become a regular figure within Iraq's national-team setup.His 24 caps have been spread across multiple competitions, highlighting his growing importance to the squad. Fourteen appearances have come in World Cup qualification matches, while he has also featured in international friendlies, AFC Asian Cup fixtures, Arabian Gulf Cup matches and now the FIFA World Cup itself.The midfielder currently plays club football for Dutch Eredivisie side Utrecht after progressing through Manchester United's academy system. His technical ability, composure in possession and versatility have made him one of the most promising players in Iraq's emerging generation.That generation carried considerable hope into the 2026 tournament. Iraq's qualification ended a four-decade World Cup drought stretching back to their only previous appearance in Mexico in 1986. For many younger supporters, this represented the nation's first opportunity to watch Iraq compete on football's biggest stage.The opening result did not go according to plan. Erling Haaland scored twice before half-time, Leo Østigård added a third after the break and a late own goal completed Norway's 4-1 victory. Aymen Hussein's equaliser briefly gave Iraq hope during the first half, but Norway's superior quality eventually told.The result means Iraq face an immediate challenge in Group I, with France awaiting in their next fixture after the world champions defeated Senegal 3-1 earlier on Matchday One. Norway and France currently occupy the top two positions in the group on three points apiece.
Article Summary: Zidane iqbal became the first player of pakistani origin to feature at a world cup while representing iraq. The 22-year-old came off the bench in the 59th minute to make his world cup debut. Iraq's return to the world cup after 40 years ended in a 4-1 defeat to norway in foxborough.

Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi survives on 0 amid third-umpire's controversial call, Afghanistan A players left in disbelief
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (Pic credit: BCCI)

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi found himself at the centre of another talking point on Wednesday after the India A opener survived on nought following a contentious third-umpire call during the 5th match of the Tri Nation A Series in Sri Lanka against Afghanistan A.The 15-year-old, who has endured a modest series so far, was handed a reprieve when Faridoon Dawoodzai appeared to pull off a stunning one-handed catch at point off Shams Ur Rahman.While the dismissal looked clean in real time, the third umpire ruled that a part of the ball had touched the ground during the completion of the catch, allowing Sooryavanshi to continue.On replay, the third umpire repeatedly asked for frame-by-frame replays before concluding that there was evidence of the ball brushing the turf.“Some part of the ball is touching the ground, made my decision,” the umpire said before the green light flashed, much to the disbelief of the Afghanistan players.The decision immediately sparked debate on social media, with fans split over whether the youngster had been fortunate to survive.“How is that catch not fair? That was as clean a catch as they come. Sooryavanshi is lucky here,” wrote one user.Another said, “I think that was out, but Sooryavanshi gets a life, make it big now.”“Really lucky to survive that call. The evidence of the ball being grassed was very hazy and unclear,” posted another fan.Some, however, pointed out that the third umpire had gone by the available evidence and the batter had earned the benefit of doubt.Ironically, that wasn't the only slice of luck for Sooryavanshi. Shortly after surviving the controversial catch, the left-hander was put down again, receiving a second reprieve.The teenager eventually got out in the 8th over after scoring 38 off 28 balls, which included two sixes and four fours. He mishit a Faridoon Dawoodzai's delivery and was caught by Khalid Taniwal at cover-point. It ended a promising 75-run opening stand with Priyansh Arya.The latest episode comes just days after Sooryavanshi was involved in a heated exchange with Sri Lanka's Vishen Halambage during India A's previous game, where the two players had to be separated following a push-and-shove incident. BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia had later urged players to focus on the game and avoid "collateral issues".Despite the attention surrounding him, Sooryavanshi has struggled to make a significant impact with the bat in the series, making his twin escapes against Afghanistan A all the more noteworthy.On the back of a stellar IPL 2026 campaign and earning his maiden India call-up, the left-handed opener has managed scores of 14, 44 and 21 so far in the series.
Article Summary: Vaibhav sooryavanshi survived on nought during the 5th match of the tri nation a series in sri lanka against afghanistan a. The 15-year-old was handed a reprieve when faridoon dawoodzai appeared to pull off a stunning one-handed catch at point off shams ur rahman.

Article Title: NBA draft 2026 update: Latest projections for the top 5 prospects
Article Text:
AJ Dybantsa. Image via: Ed Zurga/Getty Images

Which teams are favored to select the top 5 prospects?

Player details

Projected landing spot: Washington Wizards

Player details

Projected landing spot: Utah Jazz

Caleb Wilson. Image via: Ezra Shaw/ Getty Images

Player details

Projected landing spot: Chicago Bulls

No. 5: Keaton Wagler: Los Angeles Clippers continue to monitor Illinois guard



Player details

Height: 6-foot-6

Position: Guard

College: Illinois

Projected landing spot: Los Angeles Clippers

NBA draft 2026 update projections are beginning to solidify as front offices finalize their draft boards ahead of draft night. While the race for the No. 1 pick remains competitive, AJ Dybantsa, Darryn Peterson, Cameron Boozer, Caleb Wilson and Keaton Wagler have separated themselves as the consensus top tier of prospects.So far, as per projection, the Washington Wizards, Utah Jazz, Memphis Grizzlies, Chicago Bulls, and Los Angeles Clippers are expected to make pivotal selections near the top of the lottery; these five prospects could shape the league's future for years to come.Dybantsa has been the leading candidate to hear his name called first on draft night. The BYU freshman strengthened his standing throughout the season and reinforced it during the pre-draft process, where his measurements and athletic profile confirmed what scouts already believed: he possesses the physical tools of a franchise wing.Washington appears to be the most likely destination. Dybantsa worked out for both the Wizards and Jazz, but recent projections continue to connect him with the top pick. His ability to create shots from all three levels, attack the rim and operate as a point-forward gives him arguably the highest offensive ceiling in the class.There are still questions about his perimeter shooting consistency and defensive engagement.Even so, league executives increasingly view him as the safest bet among the draft's elite prospects. If those areas improve, Dybantsa has the profile of a future MVP candidate.Peterson may be the most naturally gifted scorer available. The Kansas freshman combines positional size with advanced shot-making ability, allowing him to create offense in ways few players his age can.Although injuries and availability concerns complicated parts of his freshman season, NBA evaluators remain convinced of his long-term upside. His ability to make difficult shots late in possessions stands out in a class loaded with talent.Memphis has emerged as a logical landing spot. The Grizzlies need another dynamic creator in the backcourt, and Peterson's scoring instincts could complement an already promising young core.Few prospects enter the draft with a stronger résumé than Boozer. The Duke star collected major national awards, shot nearly 40 percent from three-point range and posted one of the best statistical seasons in college basketball.What separates Boozer is not elite athleticism but polish. He processes the game quickly, makes winning plays and impacts multiple areas of the floor. Scouts consistently point to his passing, leadership and decision-making as NBA-ready traits.Utah's roster construction makes the fit particularly intriguing. Surrounded by size and frontcourt talent, Boozer would have the support needed to maximize his strengths while minimizing concerns about his vertical explosiveness.Wilson's rise into the draft's top tier has been fueled by upside. The North Carolina freshman is widely regarded as one of the most explosive athletes in the class, capable of impacting games with his energy, length and mobility.His offensive game remains a work in progress, particularly as a shooter, but evaluators are encouraged by the progress he made during his lone college season.Chicago appears positioned to benefit if Wilson reaches his ceiling. The Bulls need frontcourt athleticism, and Wilson's ability to run the floor, finish above the rim and defend multiple positions offers significant long-term value.Wagler may not possess the explosive athleticism of some lottery peers, but his basketball IQ and versatility continue to attract attention from decision-makers around the league.The Illinois freshman emerged as one of the season's biggest risers while helping lead a Final Four run. His ability to control pace, create advantages and make sound decisions with the ball has made him one of the most intriguing guard prospects available.The Clippers and Nets are frequently mentioned as potential landing spots, but Los Angeles appears to be the strongest fit. Wagler's size and playmaking profile give him a realistic path toward becoming a long-term NBA starter, which is why his stock remains firmly inside the top five entering draft week.
Article Summary: Aj dybantsa, darryn peterson, cameron boozer, caleb wilson and keaton wagler are the consensus top tier of prospects. The washington wizards, utah jazz, memphis grizzlies, chicago bulls, and los angeles clippers are expected to make pivotal selections near the top of the lottery.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chicago Bears and Denver Broncos linked to $9M Washington Commanders defensive star
Article Text:
NFL trade rumors: Chicago Bears and Denver Broncos linked to $9M Washington Commanders defensive star (Getty)

Which teams are interested in Bobby Wagner?

What insiders are saying about the rumors?

Contract details and financial outlook

How could a move impact both teams?

FAQs

Is Bobby Wagner still a free agent?

Which teams have been linked with Bobby Wagner?

What was Bobby Wagner's last contract worth?

Can Bobby Wagner still be productive?

The Chicago Bears and Denver Broncos continue to be mentioned among teams that could benefit from adding veteran help before the 2026 season begins. While no official negotiations have surfaced, one of the biggest names still available on the market is an 11-time All-Pro defender who proved last season that age has done little to slow him down.Bobby Wagner remains unsigned after spending the 2025 campaign with the Washington Commanders, and recent speculation has connected him with contenders that have either injury concerns or a need for experienced leadership. At 36, the future Hall of Famer may no longer be in his prime, but his production suggests he can still make an immediate impact.The Chicago Bears have emerged as an intriguing possibility. On paper, linebacker does not appear to be a major weakness after the additions of Devin Bush and rookie Keyshaun Elliott. However, injuries have complicated matters.Projected starter D'Marco Jackson suffered a shoulder injury during minicamp, while T.J. Edwards is still recovering from the serious leg injury he sustained during the playoffs. Elliott also missed minicamp with an injury, leaving Chicago thinner than expected heading into training camp.Wagner could provide immediate stability. Last season with Washington, he recorded 162 tackles, eight tackles for loss, 4.5 sacks, four pass breakups and two interceptions.His experience would offer the Bears a reliable presence while younger players continue to develop.The Denver Broncos have also been linked as a sensible destination. PFN's Alex Kennedy listed Denver among the teams that make the most sense for Wagner, particularly as the Broncos look to strengthen a roster with playoff ambitions Sean Payton's team has built an aggressive defense, but adding a proven leader with Wagner's résumé could elevate the unit even further. His football intelligence and consistency would fit naturally into a team aiming to take the next step in the AFC.PFN's Alex Kennedy believes Wagner still has plenty left to offer despite entering his 15th NFL season. As Kennedy wrote:"Since PFN started tallying positional scores in 2019, Bobby Wagner has been a top-10 linebacker in the NFL every single season. Those seasons don't even include most of his 'prime' years when he was a perennial All-Pro. He's arguably the best linebacker of his generation, and he's still a solid starter at this stage of his career. ”Kennedy specifically highlighted the Denver Broncos as a logical fit. Heavy's Max Dible later expanded on the discussion, suggesting the same reasoning could apply to Chicago Bears given the Bears' growing injury concerns at linebacker.Bobby Wagner played last season on a one-year, $9 million contract with Washington that included $8 million in guarantees.Spotrac currently projects his market value at approximately $7.7 million annually, making him an affordable short-term option for contenders seeking veteran help. Unlike blockbuster additions that require long-term commitments, Wagner could likely be signed to a one-year deal without significantly affecting future roster flexibility.For the Chicago Bears, signing Bobby Wagner would provide insurance and leadership during a period of uncertainty. The Bears have playoff aspirations, and relying heavily on injured or inexperienced linebackers could become risky as the season progresses.The Denver Broncos, meanwhile, would gain one of the smartest defensive minds of his generation. Wagner's presence could accelerate communication, improve run defense and offer valuable mentorship to younger players in a championship-minded locker room.At this stage, Bobby Wagner remains a free agent, and there is no indication that a deal is imminent. Still, as training camp approaches and teams reassess their rosters, the veteran linebacker remains one of the most intriguing names available.Yes. Bobby Wagner remains unsigned heading into the 2026 season.The Chicago Bears and Denver Broncos have emerged as possible landing spots.He played the 2025 season on a one-year, $9 million deal with Washington.Absolutely. He posted 162 tackles and earned strong analytical grades during the 2025 season, showing he remains an effective starter
Article Summary: Chicago bears and denver broncos linked to $9m washington commanders defensive star. At 36, bobby wagner may no longer be in his prime, but his production suggests he can still make an immediate impact. Last season with washington, he recorded 162 tackles, eight tackles for loss, 4.5 sacks, four pass breakups and two interceptions.

Article Title: Aldon Smith’s net worth: Inside the fortune of the former 49ers pass-rushing star
Article Text:
Aldon Smith’s net worth: Inside the fortune of the former 49ers pass-rushing star (Image via Getty)



How Aldon Smith became one of the NFL’s top defensive players?

Aldon Smith’s contracts, salary and career earnings

San Francisco 49ers — $14,884,492

Oakland Raiders — $2,485,294

Dallas Cowboys — $2,000,000

Seattle Seahawks — $137,500

Legal troubles, comeback attempts and life after football

Former NFL star Aldon Smith had an estimated net worth of $5 million at the time of his death on June 13, 2026. He was 36 years old. The San Francisco 49ers confirmed his death, but no cause was immediately announced. Smith was once one of the NFL’s most feared pass rushers and earned millions during his career. However, repeated suspensions and time away from football affected both his playing career and earnings.Aldon Smith was born in Kansas City, Missouri, on September 25, 1989. After a strong college career at the University of Missouri, he entered the 2011 NFL Draft and was selected seventh overall by the San Francisco 49ers.His impact was immediate. Smith recorded 14 sacks during his rookie season and finished second in Defensive Rookie of the Year voting. A year later, he delivered the best season of his career.In 2012, Smith registered 19.5 sacks, setting a single-season San Francisco 49ers franchise record. He earned Pro Bowl and First-Team All-Pro honors while helping the team reach Super Bowl XLVII. During his first two NFL seasons, he collected 33.5 sacks and quickly became one of the league’s biggest defensive stars.Smith signed NFL contracts worth more than $34 million during his career. Because of suspensions, missed seasons and releases, his actual career earnings were lower. According to salary records, he earned $19,507,286 during his time in the league.Most of that money came from his years with the San Francisco 49ers. The team signed him to a fully guaranteed four-year rookie contract worth $14.384 million after selecting him in the first round of the 2011 draft.His career earnings by team were:One of his biggest paydays came in 2011 when he earned more than $9.3 million, largely because of his signing bonus. He later signed a one-year deal with the Oakland Raiders and eventually returned to the NFL with the Dallas Cowboys in 2020 after spending more than four years away from regular-season football.While Smith’s talent on the field was undeniable, off-field issues repeatedly interrupted his career. Between 2012 and 2021, he faced several legal problems and NFL suspensions. The 49ers released him in 2015 following another arrest related to driving under the influence.His suspension kept him out of regular-season NFL action from 2016 through 2019. Still, Smith managed an unexpected comeback in 2020 with the Dallas Cowboys, appearing in all 16 games and recording five sacks.After a short stint with the Seattle Seahawks in 2021, Smith stepped away from football. In 2023, he announced that he was finished playing.Later, he focused on helping younger athletes. In 2024, he launched a mentorship project called “I.M. Loading,” which aimed to guide athletes dealing with pressure, money, fame and personal struggles. He also worked with rookie players from the Jacksonville Jaguars and Las Vegas Raiders.The San Francisco 49ers, in their statement after his death, remembered Smith for his remarkable talent and the impact he made during his early years in the NFL.
Article Summary: Aldon smith was once one of the nfl’s most feared pass rushers and earned millions during his career. However, repeated suspensions and time away from football affected both his playing career and earnings. The san francisco 49ers confirmed his death on june 13, 2026, but no cause was immediately announced.

Article Title: Did NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani accidentally confirm Taylor Swift’s wedding details?
Article Text:
Taylor Swift wedding date revealed (Getty Images)

Is Taylor Swift really getting married at Madison Square Garden on July 3?

What has Taylor Swift been up to in New York ahead of her reported wedding?

New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani may have just done what Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have refused to do for months. At a press conference on Monday, while discussing the city's preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Mamdani casually listed "Taylor Swift's wedding" alongside the Knicks' Finals run, July 4th, and America 250 as major events the city is bracing for simultaneously. No denial, no qualification. Just a matter-of-fact mention that the internet immediately ran with.The short answer: possibly. Rumors have pointed to Madison Square Garden as the venue for a July 3 ceremony, and while neither Swift nor Kelce has said a word publicly, the pieces keep falling into place. The couple reportedly paid $3 million to rent the arena for three days. MSG, for its part, has listed no public events over the holiday weekend, which leaves the door wide open.MSG CEO James Dolan added fuel to the fire when he told reporters they "got half of it wrong" while speculating about the venue arrangement, clarifying that the inaccurate part was that Travis Kelce attended a Knicks game in exchange for renting out the arena, since he was at mandatory training camp. That's not exactly a denial of the wedding itself."I am fully confident in the work of the NYPD, as well as our state partners, in delivering that safe experience," Mayor Mamdani told reporters about the World Cup."We are the biggest city in the country, we are used to big events, and we are incredibly excited for this one. We know it coincides with the Knicks' finals run. We know it coincides with July 4, America 250, Taylor Swift's wedding—all happening at the same time—and we are so excited to welcome the world here. "Mamdani, a self-confessed Swiftie, was asked point-blank whether he was invited and whether he planned to attend. His response was brief: "No and no." He followed it up with a touch of humor. "I wish them a lovely wedding. I'll listen to 'Only the Young' at home on my own," he said, referencing a Swift single from her Miss Americana documentary.Swift has been unusually visible in the city over the past week, which has only kept speculation burning. She attended Game 4 of the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden alongside Este and Alana Haim, was inducted into the Songwriter's Hall of Fame on Thursday, and spent part of the weekend watching Maya Rudolph in Oh, Mary! on Broadway with Kelce. On Monday, she was spotted entering Electric Lady Studios in Manhattan.The pair first went public with their relationship in 2023, and since then, they have frequently made headlines, from Kelce's appearances at Swift's Eras Tour shows to Swift's presence at NFL games throughout the season.The guest list, if reports are to be believed, is shaping up to be something. Kelce proposed to Swift in August 2025, and the singer captioned the post that broke the internet, "Your English teacher and gym teacher are getting married." Over 1,000 guests are expected, with names like Selena Gomez, Gigi Hadid, Suki Waterhouse, and Ed Sheeran reportedly on the list. Privacy concerns mean guests could be transported to the venue in blacked-out buses.With the World Cup final, America's 250th birthday celebrations, and the Knicks in the Finals all colliding with the same weekend, New York is already primed for chaos. A Swift-Kelce wedding in the middle of all that is either perfect timing or an absolute logistical nightmare, depending on who you ask. Either way, the mayor seems ready for it.
Article Summary: Taylor swift and travis kelce are reportedly getting married on july 3. New york city mayor zohran mamdani mentioned the wedding at a press conference on monday. He said it was part of the city's preparations for the 2026 fifa world cup.

Article Title: Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito breaks silence about their romance rumors just days ahead of him taking the field
Article Text:
Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito breaks silence about their romance rumors just days ahead of him taking the field.(Image via Getty Images)

Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito shares what she feels about the lack of privacy



Kylian Mbappé speaks out on the pressure he is facing for World Cup 2026



Real Madrid star player Kylian Mbappé’s personal life has dominated headlines even as the star player eyes a World Cup win for his nation.While both Kylian Mbappé and his girlfriend, Ester Expósito, have stayed silent about their relationship, the popular Spanish actress has opened up about the lack of privacy in her life.A few hours ago, in an interview with the French newspaper, Le Parisien, Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito opened up about it and said, "I'm getting used to it..”The popular actress added, "Since Elite, it's been the same every time something happens in my private life.”Kylian Mbappé’s girlfriend Ester Expósito continued, “I don't like it because I'm a very private person…"While Kylian Mbappé has not responded to Ester Expósito’s comments, he has gotten brutally trolled in the last few weeks for their romance.Unverified rumors of Kylian Mbappé leaving the French camp to spend time with his girlfriend, Ester Expósito, in Madrid have sparked outrage among fans.However, the truth is that the two had gone on a vacation last month and not recently. But the Real Madrid star player Kylian Mbappé has remained silent about it and has stayed away from defending himself in public.As France gears up for the first match in World Cup 2026, all eyes remain on Kylian Mbappé and if he will be able to give his best on the field this time.A few days ago, in an interview with the Irish Examiner, Kylian Mbappé opened up about the pressure he is facing this time since he is the captain of the team.The Real Madrid star player said, "But I'm ready for that, ready to lead my team to the biggest stage game, and I hope that we are gonna go back with the trophy in Paris and in the Champs-Elysees.Kylian Mbappé continued, “I think when you play, you don't think about the legacy. You think about to perform, and to bring the trophy home. If we win, and if I win, it's gonna be insane for the legacy of the country and my legacy, for sure.”As Kylian Mbappé eyes the World Cup win, many are excited to watch Ester Expósito cheer him on this time.
Article Summary: Kylian mbappé’s girlfriend ester expósito breaks silence about their romance rumors just days ahead of him taking the field. The popular spanish actress has opened up about the lack of privacy in her life. A few hours ago, in an interview with the french newspaper, le parisien, kylian mb appé‘s girlfriend said, "i'm getting used to it..”

Article Title: Is Luca Zidane related to Zinedine Zidane? Why the goalkeeper chose Algeria over France for FIFA World Cup dream
Article Text:
Luca Zidane (Getty Images)

Why did Luca Zidane choose to play for Algeria and not France or Spain?



Why is Luca Zidane wearing a mask against Argentina?



Algeria open their 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign against Argentina on Tuesday, and between the posts will be a man carrying one of football's most recognisable surnames. Luca Zidane, son of Zinedine Zidane , starts in goal for Les Fennecs. He will be wearing a protective mask after fracturing his chin and jaw in a club match in April. This will be his eighth cap for Algeria, a nation he only began representing in October 2025.Luca was born in Marseille in 1998 but spent most of his childhood in Madrid. That upbringing gave him three legitimate international options: France, where his father became a legend; Spain, the country that developed him as a footballer; and Algeria, the homeland of his paternal grandparents.For years, he went the French route. He wore the France U-17 shirt and was central to their European Championship run, famously saving three penalties against Belgium in the semifinal. It looked like a settled path.Then, in September 2024, Algerian football authorities confirmed his eligibility through his grandparents' roots. Within a month, the call-up arrived. On 14 October 2025, he made his senior debut in a World Cup qualifier against Uganda, playing all 90 minutes in a 2-1 win. He has not looked back since, earning seven more caps under coach Vladimir Petkovic before Tuesday's opener.The reasons were personal. "We've lived in an Algerian culture since we were small," Zidane told The Athletic."It's an honour to play for Algeria. The final decision was mine, but I spoke with my family, my parents, my brothers, my grandfather. My father was happy, he knew it was something I wanted to do. To be able to play in a World Cup is a dream for any kid."His brothers faced similar choices. Each of the four Zidane sons grew up eligible for three nations, and each arrived at his own answer.The mask is not a style choice. In April, while playing for his club side Granada, Zidane collided badly and fractured both his chin and jaw. He needed surgery and spent over a month on the sidelines. His first return to a pitch came during Algeria's pre-tournament friendlies earlier this month.He marked that comeback well. Against the Netherlands on 3 June, he kept a clean sheet and made six saves as Algeria won 1-0. The mask stays on for protection, and it was firmly in place when he lined up against Messi's Argentina to open Group J.After Argentina, Algeria face Jordan and then Austria to complete their group stage.Also Read: FIFA World Cup 2026 schedule and FIFA points
Article Summary: Luca zidane will start in goal for algeria against argentina on tuesday. He was born in marseille in 1998 but spent most of his childhood in madrid. He could have played for france, where his father zinedine is a legend, spain, the country that developed him as a footballer; and algeria, the homeland of his paternal grandparents.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Patriots linked to land Giants’ $31 million pass rusher in surprising offseason shakeup
Article Text:
NFL trade Rumors (Getty Images)

Is Kayvon Thibodeaux the edge rusher the Patriots should target?

Kayvon Thibodeaux’s name is back in trade discussions after a recent proposal linked the New York Giants edge rusher to the New England Patriots. The idea, floated by Bleacher Report’s Gary Davenport, suggests New England could send a conditional 2027 third-round pick to acquire the former No. 5 overall selection. While there is no indication a deal is imminent, the proposal has generated attention because of Thibodeaux’s age, pedigree, and the Patriots’ need for help off the edge. At 25, he remains one of the more intriguing bounce-back candidates in the NFL despite an injury-plagued stretch over the past two seasons.The logic behind the proposed move is easy to understand. New England enters 2026 with questions at edge rusher, and Thibodeaux offers a combination of upside and experience that is difficult to find at a reasonable trade cost.Davenport argued that the Patriots should be aggressive in pursuing pass-rush help.“Of course, if the Giants can get a better deal than the compensatory pick the team will get when (Kayvon) Thibodeaux all but certainly leaves in 2027 in free agency, it could be another story,” Davenport wrote. “The Patriots have already pushed their chips into the middle of the table with the A.J. Brown trade.”He went a step further, adding: “For the opportunity to bolster the pass rush, New England might as well mortgage the future a little bit more.And while Thibodeaux had a down 2025, we are talking about a 25-year-old former top-five pick with an 11.5-sack season on his NFL resume.”That upside is what makes the discussion interesting. Thibodeaux has not consistently built on the promise he showed earlier in his career. Injuries have limited his availability, costing him 12 games over the last two seasons. Production has dipped as well, with only eight combined sacks since his breakout campaign.Still, the Patriots have reasons to explore every available option. Harold Landry III dealt with injuries during stretches of the 2025 season, while rookie Gabe Jacas has yet to establish himself. During spring practices, New England relied heavily on Dre'Mont Jones, Elijah Ponder, Bradyn Swinson and Jesse Luketa. Adding another proven edge defender would provide much-needed depth and insurance.The bigger obstacle may be New York's willingness to negotiate. ESPN's Adam Schefter previously reported that the Giants “never came close to trading Thibodeaux during the NFL draft,” a sign that the organization still views him as an important piece of its future.For now, the proposal remains hypothetical. Yet it highlights an interesting question facing both franchises: whether the Giants should cash in on Thibodeaux's value now or continue betting that his best football is still ahead.
Article Summary: A recent proposal linked the new york giants edge rusher to the new england patriots. The idea suggests new england could send a conditional 2027 third-round pick to acquire the former no. 5 overall selection.
